title: SGA Unicode Font
description: Change the unicode version of Standard Galactic Alphabet texture in minecraft
body:
Change the (slightly modified) unicode version of [Standard Galactic Alphabet](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Standard_Galactic_Alphabet) to match the texture of it in minecraft. ## Preview **Before**
**After**
